name: atlas-teaser
description: Atlas SaaS motion-graphic teaser — built with Remotion.

scripts.render: npm run embed-fonts && remotion render AtlasTeaser out/atlas-teaser.mp4 --concurrency=2
scripts.render:hd: npm run embed-fonts && remotion render AtlasTeaser out/atlas-teaser.mp4 --concurrency=2 --crf=16
scripts.still: npm run embed-fonts && remotion still AtlasTeaser out/poster.png --frame=560
